product.description: With our latest improved recipe, FairPrice Cream Crackers is crunchy and lightly salted. Enjoy them on their own and add them to your usual snacks.

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat flour, Palm olein, Corn starch, Palm oil, Salt, Malt syrup (contains gluten), Calcium carbonate, Raising agents [E500(ii), E503(ii)], Yeast, Milk fat, Emulsifier (soy lecithin) and Enzyme (E1100).
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat. Store in an airtight container after opening to maintain crispiness.
